data.title: test_intent_gap_analysis fails: Phase 1 Gate section missing targeted questions reference in brainstorm SKILL.md
data.description: Pre-existing test failure in tests/skills/test-brainstorm-progressive-validation.sh::test_intent_gap_analysis. The test checks for 'targeted questions' reference in the Phase 1 Gate section of brainstorm SKILL.md, but the phrase is absent. Discovered during task 1f99-21e1 sprint batch — unrelated to onboarding changes.
